job.title: IT Recruitment & Business Development Apprentice
job.published: Published on 11 June 2026 · Position available immediately
job.desc.1: Move2Cloud is recruiting an apprentice in Lyon to join our HR & sales team. You actively participate in recruiting IT profiles and in the commercial development of the agency.
mission.1: Source and pre-screen IT profiles on LinkedIn and job boards
mission.4: Assist with business development: prospecting, follow-up, client management
mission.6: Participate in recruitment events and campus forums
profile.1: Currently enrolled in a Bac+3/5 programme in HR, business school, or equivalent
profile.2: Première expérience ou stage en recrutement ou commercial is a plus
profile.3: Strong interpersonal skills and enjoyment of client interactions
profile.4: Energy, curiosity, and eagerness to learn
profile.5: Proficiency in office tools and LinkedIn
